CustomField.formula: IF( OR(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '巡店'), ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '客户拜访'),ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '渠道拓展'),ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '重点产品')), TEXT( Number__c ), IF( OR(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '人均效率'),ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '店均效率')) , TEXT((Percent__c * 100)) + '%' , IF(ISPICKVAL( Task_Type__c , '销售额'), TEXT(CurrencyIsoCode) + ' ' + TEXT( Sales__c ), '') ) )
CustomField.label: Show
